trigger
=======



Tables
------

.. _trigger.rule:

rule
````



+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| Name                  | Type     |   Description |
+=======================+==========+===============+
| name                  | name     |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| notification_store_id | int4     |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| granularity           | interval |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| default_interval      | interval |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| id                    | int4     |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+
| enabled               | bool     |               |
+-----------------------+----------+---------------+


.. _trigger.exception_base:

exception_base
``````````````



+-----------+-------------+---------------+
| Name      | Type        |   Description |
+===========+=============+===============+
| entity_id | int4        |               |
+-----------+-------------+---------------+
| start     | timestamptz |               |
+-----------+-------------+---------------+
| expires   | timestamptz |               |
+-----------+-------------+---------------+
| id        | int4        |               |
+-----------+-------------+---------------+
| created   | timestamptz |               |
+-----------+-------------+---------------+


.. _trigger.rule_tag_link:

rule_tag_link
`````````````



+---------+--------+---------------+
| Name    | Type   |   Description |
+=========+========+===============+
| rule_id | int4   |               |
+---------+--------+---------------+
| tag_id  | int4   |               |
+---------+--------+---------------+

create_kpi_view_sql(trigger.rule, text) -> text[]
`````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.get_notification_fn_sql(trigger.rule):

get_notification_fn_sql(trigger.rule) -> text
`````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.notification_view_name(trigger.rule):

notification_view_name(trigger.rule) -> name
````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.notification_view_sql(trigger.rule):

```````````````````````````````````````````

````````````````````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.cleanup_rule(trigger.rule):

cleanup_rule(trigger.rule) -> trigger.rule
``````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.tag(character varying, integer):

tag(character varying, integer) -> trigger.rule_tag_link
````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Add tag with name tag_name to rule with id rule_id.
The tag must already exist.

.. _trigger.timestamps(trigger.rule):

timestamps(trigger.rule) -> SETOF timestamp with time zone
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.cleanup_on_rule_delete():

cleanup_on_rule_delete() -> trigger
```````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.add_insert_trigger(notification_directory.notification_store):

add_insert_trigger(notification_directory.notification_store) -> notification_directory.notification_store
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trigger.define_notification(char[], text):

define_notification(char[], text) -> trigger.rule
`````````````````````````````````````````````````
